_doc: Invasion (INV) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/inv.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 110C / 110U / 110R / 0M. Collation: US: sequential collation, 10x11 sheets, four common runs (A/B 30 cards, C/D 25 cards). Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Occasional foil (1:100) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Large set; also has four variations of each basic land. Printed in English in the USA; Belgian English printing existence unknown. Booster commons: 6 from runs A/B + 5 from runs C/D. Tournament packs (30 lands, 3 rares, 10 uncommons, 32 commons) documented but not modelled. Foil 1:100 cards. 36 packs per box.
